abstract.t:
This document specifies Best Current Practice for making decisions within the IETF process.
It updates Section 3.3 of [RFC2418].
About This Document
This note is to be removed before publishing as an RFC.
Status information for this document may be found at https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-nottnick-ietf-decisions/.
information can be found at https://projects.mnot.net/I-D/.
Source for this draft and an issue tracker can be found at https://github.com/mnot/I-D/labels/SHORT.
